use_when: Convert deterministic natural-language procedures into executable scripts
excludes: Tasks requiring LLM reasoning or ambiguity resolution

use_when: Evaluate whether a procedure should become a deterministic script
excludes: Generating scripts or modifying the source asset

use_when: Plan the language, path, and edits for approved scriptification
excludes: Evaluating feasibility or writing the script

use_when: Apply an approved scriptification plan by writing and integrating the script
excludes: Planning, evaluation, or unapproved script generation
